title: The pillarmen mod
description: adds the pillar men from jojos bizzare adventure
body:
This minecraft mod adds the pillarmen from jojo's bizzare adventure battle tendency into the overworld.

They are tameable using the red stone of aja and somewhat are durable against some engender mobs. 

So far this mod adds the main pillarmen

Lord Kars 

Esidisi

Whamuu

Santana

NovelKars

 Planned content

lisa lisa

joseph joestar

speedwagon

caesar![kars mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c83d0b11873155e881e1957a3d95aa80755935c.png)![Esidisi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591e8db3a796227c36f11602ddb383db7c6ef231.png)
